info.title: ScrapAI API
info.description: REST API for ScrapAI spiders and crawls

post.description: Create multiple crawl runs in a single request (max 10 spiders).
Create a new crawl run and queue it for execution.

get.description: List crawl runs for a project.

schema.title: Response List Crawl Runs Api V1 Crawls  Get

get.description: Get the status of a specific crawl run.
Stream crawl progress via Server-Sent Events (SSE).

post.description: Analyze a source URL and return a suggested spider configuration.

get.description: List spiders with optional project filtering.

schema.title: Response List Spiders Api V1 Spiders  Get

post.description: Create a spider, or update it when the same name already exists.

get.description: Get details of a spider by project and name.

post.description: Fetch and save a page's HTML for selector testing.
Fetch a page and test a CSS selector against it. Returns matched elements.

get.description: Return the full raw JSON config for a spider, ready for editing and re-importing.
Get details of a specific spider.

put.description: Update an existing spider from JSON configuration.

delete.description: Soft-delete a spider by setting active=false.

get.description: Get a specific scraped item by ID.
Get a scraped item by URL.
List webhook subscriptions for a project.

schema.title: Response List Webhook Subscriptions Api V1 Webhooks  Get

get.description: List recent webhook delivery records, filterable by status and event_type.

schema.title: Response List Webhook Deliveries Api V1 Webhooks Deliveries Get

requested_limit.title: Requested Limit
requested_limit.description: Maximum items to scrape per spider

BatchCrawlCreate.description: Schema for creating multiple crawl runs in one request.

BatchCrawlResponse.title: BatchCrawlResponse
BatchCrawlResponse.description: Response for a batch crawl creation.

BatchCrawlRunItem.title: BatchCrawlRunItem
BatchCrawlRunItem.description: Single crawl run entry in a batch response.

output_mode.title: Output Mode
output_mode.description: Output mode: db, file, or jsonl

CrawlRunCreate.title: CrawlRunCreate
CrawlRunCreate.description: Schema for creating a crawl run.

ResultItemResponse.title: ResultItemResponse
ResultItemResponse.description: Schema for a single scraped item.

SpiderInspectRequest.title: SpiderInspectRequest
SpiderInspectRequest.description: Request payload for fetching a page's HTML.

SpiderMutationResponse.title: SpiderMutationResponse
SpiderMutationResponse.description: Structured response for create/update spider mutations.

SpiderTestSelectorRequest.title: SpiderTestSelectorRequest
SpiderTestSelectorRequest.description: Request payload for testing a CSS selector against a page.

WebhookCreateResponse.title: WebhookCreateResponse
WebhookCreateResponse.description: Webhook creation response with returned secret.
